programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangling from a rope off the roof. Contestants will have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face. The contestant will be standing on a beam suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon. The contestant must start the car, there are tractors driving towards their car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be laying on their back on a plexi-glass platform that is hung from a helicopter. Contestants will determine how much of the animals they will have to eat. Contestant will have to cross beams placing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water. A contestant bobs into a tank of fluid. One will be driving the main car and the other will be driving the ramp car along a flatbed semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants sit on a bicycle on top of one of two semi trucks. Contestants have to pick up hornworms and squeeze the juice out into a glass. Contestant must walk on beam from one building to another.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be riding on the back of a jet ski. Contestant is placed in a Plexiglas helmet, which is then filled with moray eels. Contestants must ride a platform that is continuously moving and retrieve a flag and return to the moving platform.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound face to face by their wrists to a poll attached to a plexi-glass platform. Contestants are placed into a Plexiglas helmet filled with spiders. Couples will be standing and bound by their ankles to a platform attached to a lever.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be strapped by their waist, ankles, and wrist and locked to the face of a wheel, halfway into the water. Contestants will shoot at wall of bottles with a paintball gun. Contestant must stand on a swaying platform hanging from a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing a chain mail suit. Contestants will shoot a flaming arrow from a cross bow at a scarecrow target. Contestant is secured into an upright coffin, filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will climb out of the moving tram and grab a net attached to the tram. Contestants will drink a shake consisting of rats. A plexi-glass wall with a lip hangs under the helicopter and they must traverse the wall releasing flags along the way.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Baseball Seasons
programme.desc: The great Hank Aaron breaks Babe Ruth’s all-time home run record. The A’s dynasty continues as they roll through the American League and face off with the Dodgers in the World Series

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: In his 19th and final All-Star Game, Cal Ripken Jr. hits a home run to lead the American League to a 4-1 victory over the National League. The 2001 All-Star Game was also the final game for Padres right fielder Tony Gwynn.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: Ichiro Suzuki makes history in 2007 by hitting the first ever inside-the-park home run during an All-Star Game. He was rewarded MVP for going 3-for-3 at the plate and collecting two RBIs in an American League victory, 5-4.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 2008 MLB All-Star Game at Yankee Stadium was marked as the longest All-Star Game in history. It ended after 4 hours and 50 minutes in the 15th inning on a walk-of sacrifice fly from Michael Young.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/7/52: Mickey Mantle's 6th inning home run and Billy Martin's game-saving catch help the New York Yankees win their 4th straight World Series, beating the Brooklyn Dodgers in 7 games.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first episode of the 1952 serial featuring Commander Cody's trip to the moon.

programme.title: MST3K: Master Ninja I
programme.desc: The crew watch a ninja and a drifter save an airport from thugs in "Master Ninja I" while building a model muscle car and experimenting with their ninja skills.

programme.title: MST3K: Master Ninja II
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots endure two equally bad episodes from the failed action seriesThe Master(1984).

programme.title: MST3K: Invasion Of The Neptune Men
programme.desc: Our heroes discover just how boring an alien attack on Tokyo can be when they view an anti-vehicle for Sonny Chiba.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Don't leave the house before watching this indispensable guide to hygiene.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.

programme.title: MST3K: Earth vs. The Spider
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots get tips on public speaking from the short Speech: Using Your Voice and watch a spider devour a town in Earth vs the Spider (1958)

programme.title: MST3K: The Giant Spider Invasion
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots suffer through The Giant Spider Invasion (1975).

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A group of showgirls washes up on a deserted island after their plane crashes. Soon they discover the island is home to a large, radioactive spider.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: In part two of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the team discuss the Satellite of Love crew.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La relación entre Igor y Talía cada vez se hace más intensa y amorosa y por supuesto esto a Arantxa no le cae nada bien y la pone en un lugar caliente, llevando la tensión a toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Catfish México

programme.desc: Eugene and Kendra are tired of being harassed by Simone, his ex, who alleges he fathered her 3 children. While he does admit to sleeping with her, he denies the kids because he says she slept around! What will the DNA test results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: With two small children at home, Anna's severe drug addiction has led her to prostituting to feed her habit. Her mother, who's had to raise the children, is terrified for her daughter's life.

programme.desc: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together. Next Rovin is here to confront her best friend for sleeping with Chucky, Robin's boyfriend. But Chucky shocks both women when he introduces them to his new lover, Arthur!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: In this special episode, a group of select viewers will duke it out with some of Jerry’s outrageously memorable guests!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On Today's MAURY… The time for lying is over and the truth will be revealed. Who's right and who's about to get caught red handed! It's wild tales of cheating lovers forced to face the lie detector results on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: John and his wife Yolanda believe Keia is trying to trap him with someone else's baby because she's obsessed with him! Plus, after a wild New Year's Eve bash, whose baby did Payge conceive? Is it Floyd, Phillip or neither man?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The show continues with more past guests returning to add to the mayhem!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, Marisol regresa por 12º vez para hacer la prueba de su 15º hombre. Luego, Dalyna vino a demostrar que Johnny Mack es el padre de su hijo. Él dice que es imposible porque le parece que el bebé es "demasiado feo" para ser suyo.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva se aprovecha del conflicto existente entre Rosaura y Patricio para tensar aún más la situación con Rosaura, al amenazarla con revelarle a Patricio lo de su embarazo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Gabriel acosa a Eva con su amenaza de desenmascarar ante Luis Mario la dudosa situación sobre su paternidad del recién nacido hijo de Eva. Camelia llena de intrigas la cabeza de Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve sometida una vez más a la amenaza de Camelia, quien la advierte sobre su disposición de delatar su embarazo ante Patricio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve enfrentada a la ira de Patricio, quien para salvar su descrédito publico le exige a ella deshacerse de su embarazo pero Rosaura defiende su embarazo y el derecho de su hijo a nacer.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura aprovecha su momento de una revancha en contra de Eduarda al saber que Luis Mario fue expulsado de la hacienda por su hermana, al no querer reconocerlo como un Arismendi.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Tras ser testigo de la decisión de mudanza de Rosaura, Camelia se apresura a informar a Patricio de lo acontecido con el abandono de su esposa. Marybella se insinúa ante Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura esta desconcertada al saber que Luis Mario se involucro sentimentalmente con otra mujer. Caridad intenta tranquilizarla con sus palabras.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le cuenta a Camelia lo que sucedió con Rosaura, que se mudó a la hacienda de los Arismendi. Imanol le cuenta a Iván que robó en un negocio para drogarse. Iván trata de aconsejarlo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la hacienda, Bruno conversa con Rosaura, demostrándole a ella su inquebrantable lealtad al ofrecerse como el padre y protector del niño que está por nacer.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Durante su regreso de la visita a la casa de María Julia, Rosaura es víctima de un accidentado encuentro con Patricio, quien desata en su contra toda su ira.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Gabriel le revela a Luis Mario la realidad de sus sospechas sobre el hijo de Eva. Marybella trata de quitar de su camino todos los obstáculos que la separan de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Como le dijo la quiromántica a Rosaura, del cielo baja en paracaídas el hombre que la va a rescatar. Iván le cuenta a Imanol que con la ayuda de Adriana ya puede ponerse en pie y no caerse.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario trata de seducir a Rosaura pero ella no se deja. Aparece Camelia y les dice que esa escena la va a conocer Patricio. Marybella está furiosa porque Luis Mario está con Rosaura.

programme.desc: Hordy announces his plan for turning humans into slaves, the people of Fish-Man Island throw their support behind a new champion, and Luffy amazes even his own friends!

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: Sean Connery is back as James Bond, hired to prevent madmen from exploding a nuclear device near picturesque Nassau in this explosive thriller which earned an Oscar for its special visual effects.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: Roger Moore's debut as James Bond takes him in pursuit of a voodoo- worshipping underworld drug czar who leads him from Harlem to New Orleans to the exotic Caribbean. Jane Seymour also stars.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun
programme.desc: After his life is threatened, Roger Moore as 007 is lured into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with a million-dollar killer (Christopher Lee). Britt Ekland and Maud Adams co-star.

programme.title: The Spy Who Loved Me
programme.desc: Roger Moore as agent 007 teams with a beautiful Soviet agent (Barbara Bach) to battle Stromberg (Curt Jurgens) in order to save the world from total annihilation and a 315-pound villian, "Jaws" (Richard Kiel).

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Roger Moore, in his fourth role as Agent 007, is sent to outer space to protect Britain and the world from a madman who would destroy the earth in this pulse-pounding, out-of-this-universe adventure.

programme.title: Misión espacial
programme.desc: El agente 007 se lanza a una trepidante aventura que lo lleva desde Venecia hasta Río de Janeiro y más allá, al espacio exterior. Roger Moore encarna por cuarta vez al carismático agente 007.

programme.title: Sólo para sus ojos
programme.desc: James Bond se ve inmerso en una de sus más intensas aventuras en este paquete de acción, de increíbles acrobacias, encuentros apasionados y excitantes enfrentamientos.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Desde una emocionante persecución en jet hasta una cuenta regresiva de un desastre nuclear, James Bond vuelve en una electrizante aventura que nos lleva al límite del estremecimiento con emoción incesante.

programme.title: En la mira de los asesinos
programme.desc: Roger Moore llena la pantalla de humor, elegancia y encanto. Bond se enfrenta a Max Zorin (Christopher Walken), quien busca controlar el mercado de microchips, incluso si significa matar a millones para lograrlo.

programme.title: Su nombre es peligro
programme.desc: Equipado con agudos instintos y una licencia para matar, James Bond enfrenta a mercaderes de armas diabólicos decididos a dominar el mundo en esta emocionante y tumultuosa aventura.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Defiance is a riveting adventure that showcases the extraordinary true story of the Bielski brothers, simple farmers -outnumbered and outgunned- who turned a group of war refugees into powerful freedom fighters.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two hot-shot rival Los Angeles detectives are forced to work together even though they are complete opposites. Finding themselves in prison together after being framed in a drug deal, the unlikely duo break out and go after a crime boss.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: The Malaysian Snake Guardian
programme.desc: Not only snakes but the utmost wild creatures and exuberant jungle share life and planet earth.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Give me this, I will give you that". This universal definition of trade finds an equivalent in nature in a phenomenon called "mutualism". Shaped by evolution, it describes all long or short-term exchanges and cooperation between animals to survive.

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Penny Dreadful

programme.title: Bloodwork

programme.title: Farscape

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: During routine searches for Peacekeeper beacons, D'Argo falls down a chute, destroys a Peacekeeper shield and gets ejected into open space.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: From There to Here
programme.desc: The sky above is studded with stars and countless galaxies. In them, we can read not only our origin, but also our final destination. Technology is on the brink of taking us to places we have only dreamed of.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: Mars has fired our imagination for thousands of years. The tantilizing possibility of life has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system. It is the only other place that man may one day call home.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system 4.5 billions years ago, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution. Remnant debris, asteroids, and comets are what's left of the building blocks to our celestial neighborhood.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Gas Giants
programme.desc: In the cold, dark expanse of our solar system, beyond the asteroid belt, lie the giant planets. Some can be seen with the naked eye, others have been visited by our camera. What secrets do they hold?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: There are many more worlds in our solar system than just the planets. The mysterious moons of the gas giants may hold much more than we ever imagined. Each one is unique, and each one deserves a scrutinous eye.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe, the further back in time we reach. Most of what we see is actually dark matter and dark energy, but its nature eludes us ... for the moment.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: Who are these people that venture into space? Once they were test pilots, then scientists and engineers now teachers, politicians and paying tourists what does it take to earn the astronaut wings?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Space: Getting There
programme.desc: The new surge in space transportation, privately owned companies vying for government contracts and private entrepreneurs looking to build hotels in space.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: Chances are, you are watching this program by satellite, one way or the other. Every day we use these wonders of human design, from communication and weather observation, to GPS and recourse management.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Mars: Adapt or Leave
programme.desc: Air, water, food, electricity and fuel all the essentials to explore the solar system, this episode explores the innovative plans for astronauts to grow their own food and extract water and fuel at their destinations.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Emissiaries
programme.desc: NASA and others are developing new innovative propulsion systems, Ion thrusters, solar sails and the science fiction 'Warp drive' is not as far away as once thought.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Danger, Asteroids Ahead
programme.desc: The threat of an asteroid strike is a very real danger in our solar system, mankind is now in a position to defend the planet from such an eventuality.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: The life cycle of stars reveal to us the past and the future of Earth and ourselves.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Dark Side
programme.desc: In terms of the Universe, we know we don't know much, especially when it comes to dark matter and dark energy. Scientists are devoting so much of their time to discovering as much as the possibly can about this mysterious matter.

programme.title: Into the Cosmos: The Space Race, Mars and Beyond

programme.title: Exoplanets: Thousands Of New Worlds

programme.title: Everything and Nothing: The Amazing Science of Empty Space: Everything and Nothing: The Amazing Science of Empty Space (2012)
programme.desc: Uncover the true size of everything and the learn amazing science behind empty space. Part science, part philosophy and part history, this film combines all these elements into a gripping and spectacular narrative that are truly unforgettable.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se interpone en una decisión de Norma, ellas pierden la paciencia en medio de una discusión. Jimena encuentra un regalo con una nota escrita, la letra es igual a la de su padre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acompaña a Gabriela para rescatar a Jimena, su madre se ofende al saber que ella trabaja en la panadería de Juan. Rosario renuncia al bar para irse de gira con otro representante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela ve a Norma y a Juan cuando se besan, ella le revela quién es el padre de su hijo, su madre cae desmayada, mientras Fernando escucha tras la puerta y sale armado de la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando encuentra a su esposa con las maletas listas, él le deja el camino libre, Gabriela prefiere que se vaya su hija y no Fernando. Juan se angustia porque no conoce la decisión de Norma.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde el control a causa de sus celos y termina peleando con sus propios hermanos. Lupe lo abandona por su actitud. Juan y Paula sufren por la separación. Modesto podría ser descubierto al llevar a cabo las órdenes de Emilio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula continúan sufriendo en silencio por no estar juntos. Julieta alucina con que tuvo intimidad con Juan. Ella, preocupada, acude al médico para recibir los resultados de sus exámenes. Gaspar se disculpa con Lupe quien condiciona su regreso.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Un hombre se presenta como esposo de Paula y revela verdades desconocidas, esta noticia le da una vuelta a la relación con Juan. Julieta esconde su enfermedad. Beatriz y Guadalupe cosechan éxitos como cantantes.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le pide a Paula que se vaya de la hacienda, pero ella se niega a irse. Esteban provoca a Juan y este reacciona con violencia, ya que no logra controlar sus celos. A Julieta se le intensifica su dolor de cabeza y sigue con su camino lleno de venganzas.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julio repite el nombre de Gabriela Suárez mientras agoniza, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia se lo hace notar. Alejandro sabe que su mamá no siente nada por la muerte de Montemar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando encuentra a su esposa con las maletas listas, él le deja el camino libre, Gabriela prefiere que se vaya su hija y no Fernando. Juan se angustia porque no conoce la decisión de Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena invita a Norma a cenar en la casa de Juan, él tiene miedo de perderla. Franco recibe una oferta de trabajo de Eduvina Trueba, una viuda millonaria que hace lo imposible para seducirlo.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of Africa's best national parks, like the world-famous Serengeti, Botswana's Chobe National Park, and Lope National Park in Gabon. Forest elephants, Leopards, Hippos, Crocs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is counting down the loud mouths of the animal world. Howler monkeys, sperm whales, wolves and lions are just a few of the famous talkers on today’s show. Find out which “call of the wild” is the loudest of all!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he hits the road in search of amazing animal adventures. Elephant seals with their own freeway exit, a drive to the end of the Earth for dolphins, a Thai elephant expressway, and more epic road trips!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Countdown to Discovery
programme.desc: Join Jack as he meets up with six of the planet’s most recently discovered animals, like the elusive okapi, adorable pygmy hippo, rare sun-tailed monkey, highly endangered mountain gorilla, the see-through Fijian crested iguana, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Africa and the front lines of this growing threat to see what can be done to save the rhino from extinction. Jack meets the conservationists who are fighting back using every possible option.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of nature’s most fearsome fangs. Hippos, Rattlesnakes, Baboons, Bats, Lions, and Devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets up with some of nature’s biggest eaters! Crocs, African wild dogs, bears, gorillas, lions, jackals and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he searches for the greatest ape species, like Gorillas, Orangutans, Chimpanzees, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Picky Eaters
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on six species that take picky eating to the extreme! A panda that brunches on bamboo, marsupials that munch on eucalyptus, flamingoes that savor the flavor of algae, plus many more finicky eaters are on today’s countdown menu.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Hospitals
programme.desc: Jack visits the doctors and hospitals that care for creatures big and small – from Silverback Gorillas and lightning-quick cheetahs to pet pigs and rescued possums. Today, see some of the world’s outstanding animal hospitals in action!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Getting Around
programme.desc: Traveling the world in search of exotic animals, like migrating wildebeest, rare mountain gorillas, and amazing underwater sea life, Jungle Jack has hitched rides on hot-air balloons, camels, and even submarines!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he travels to the remote Sukau River on the island of Borneo in Malaysia where he gets a seldom-seen look at pygmy elephants as they emerge from the rain forest.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits a breeding project focused on saving the endangered condor, the largest flying bird in the world. With its unique location in the middle of prime condor habitat, “condor Hausi” hopes to reproduce the massive bird in captivity.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's on a mission in Kenya and he's heading straight for the world's largest land mammals -- African elephants and white rhinos! Jack never forgets the little guys, join in as he uncovers some delicate and vital relationships in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack joins in on a mission to save an Elephant caught in a deadly snare, before getting a glimpse of life on the savannah for Lions and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is traveling across the globe to bring you his favorite zoo adventures! From Asia's Singapore Zoo to Healesville in Australia, Calgary Zoo in Canada, and Jack's home, see what it's like behind the scenes at some of the world's coolest zoos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he comes face-to-face with the powerful pachyderms of Chobe National Park. The park is known for its massive elephant population, but Jack also encounters Hippos, Cape Buffalo, Kudu, Crocs, Warthogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wildlife Crime-Fighters
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the frontlines witnessing conservation and anti-poaching efforts in action around the world all to help save threatened and endangered species. Rhinos, elephants, primates and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as meets creatures that have some of the sunniest dispositions on Earth. Hippos, Marine Iguanas, African Penguins, Galapagos Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Baby Animals
programme.desc: The cuddly and rambunctious world of baby animals is always filled with fun and surprises. From orangutans and manatees to mountain gorillas, join in as Jack counts down ten moments of magic and mayhem with animal babies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to return twin orphaned Manatees back to the wild, before visiting the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some superb simians, each with their own unique adaptations. Proboscis Monkeys, Spider Monkeys, Macaques, Mandrills, Langurs, and lots more magnificent monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wild Guides
programme.desc: Join Jack on a Wild Countdown safari to South Africa, Peru, Kenya, Borneo, and Namibia with Jack’s favorite guides leading the way to see cheetahs, lions, rhinos, pink dolphins, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he explores Chile from top to bottom! From the unique animals of the Atacama Desert to picturesque Patagonia, come along for a journey filled with South American wildlife like flamingoes, penguins, guanacos, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stinkiest Stinkers
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he sniffs out the smelliest animals on the planet! Sloths, Tasmanian devils, sperm whales, binturongs, hyenas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares smoky haddock corn chowder, spiced tiger prawns, rainbow salad, and raspberry and elderflower slushie.

programme.desc: Two bank robbers hide out in a doctor's house after one of them is wounded during a robbery.

programme.desc: Two men come up with a scheme to defraud the parents of Civil War soldiers.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: An actress and two accomplices use various disguises to carry out their crimes.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A mortgage holder schemes to repossess a ranch for its mineral deposits.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A woman who cannot write or speak is the only person who can bring three murderers to justice.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: In an effort to trap a gang of stage robbers, the Texas Rangers make one of their own an "outcast.".

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Outlaws lead respectable lives across a county line.

programme.desc: A prospector finds the booty of a notorious outlaw who has escaped from prison.

programme.desc: Two lockets serve as the catalyst for reuniting a boy and his father.

programme.desc: The Lone Ranger joins a band of thieves, hoping to trap them.

programme.desc: A man confesses in an effort to prevent his brother from hanging for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto help Rick Merill keep a railroad franchise.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A psychic predicts the world will end during the cruise and a woman discovers that her late husband arranged a romantic cruise for her and her former lover.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An all-star cast visits beautiful and romantic locales on a cruise to Spain and Portugal. Guest stars include Melissa Sue Anderson, Olivia Brown, Mary Crosby, Lorenzo Lamas, William R. Moses, Cesar Romero, Sada Thompson, and Adrian Zmed.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An all-star cast visits beautiful and romantic locales on a cruise to Spain and Portugal. Guest stars include Melissa Sue Anderson, Olivia Brown, Mary Crosby, Lorenzo Lamas, William R. Moses, Cesar Romero, Sada Thompson, and Adrian Zmed.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Vicki is upset about her dad's impending marriage and a professional football player tries to save his job when a new woman becomes owner of the team.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing gets cold feet on the eve of his wedding and Gopher gets an offer to manage a tropical resort.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Cruise
programme.desc: Doc marries a younger woman only to run into his ex-wife while on his honeymoon. Meanwhile, a voluptuous diet doctor hires a svelte fitness instructor to impersonate her, and a man has to tell his partner their relationship may be over.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Bonnie Franklin appears as Capt. Stubing's infuriatingly sarcastic ex-wife with her present spouse, the captain's boss.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Oh, Dale!," John Ritter plays a rejected suitor hot on the trail of the girl he loves, who happens to be a heartless fortune-seeker named Joann (Jennifer Shaw).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Ex Plus Y," newlyweds Terri and Ron Larson (Loretta "M*A*S*H" Swit and Richard "Soap" Mulligan) are adjusting well until Terri encounters ex-husband Barney (Robert Reed) aboard ship with his lady friend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Message for Maureen," a famous female tennis pro (Brenda Benet) confined to a wheelchair as the result of a serious accident, finds herself in a relationship with a sports writer (Bill Bixby) who was once her severest critic.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Help, Murder," Denise and Bret (Michele Lee and David Groh) are a married couple getting away from their three kids for the first time.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "The Joker is Mild," has-been comedian Barry Keyes (Phil Foster) abuses his family tie with cruise director Julie in an astonishing attempt to make a comeback.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Terrible-Monster Sabotendar appears. It gets defeated by Ace, but then transforms into a red cactus flower, waiting for its resurrection. TAC gets ahold of the specimen from a boy named Saburo, and then they try to rid of it in outer space, but...

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Seiji and Yuko notice the Ultra Sign shown in the sky. Ace joins up with his four brothers, and they head to Planet Golgotha. Unfortunately, this is all a trap devised by the Yapool. Terrible-Monster Barabbas arrives on the undefended Earth!

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Ace loses his battle as his brothers are taken as hostages. TAC's Commanding Officer Takakura decides upon the total destruction of Planet Golgotha using the Superluminal Missile and appoints Hokuto as its pilot.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: While TAC's Imano is back home in Okayama for a holiday, he meets a boy named Yumeji who can talk with a horseshoe crab. The horseshoe crab warns Yumeji and Seiji that a terrible monster is on its way to Earth. The battle with King Crab begins!

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: TAC's Yoshimura meets up with Takai on his way back home. Troublemaker Takai takes a nose ring from a sacred hill that worships cattle. That night, Takai's body undergoes a transformation and he eventually becomes Cowra, the Cattle God Terrible-Monster!

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Many accidents were reported in Hotarugawara Bypass. Strangely, all persons involved in the accidents were skeletonized. Yuko arrives at the scene to investigate and becomes friends with a wheelchair-bound girl called Tamiko.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Seiji and Yuko meet Saburo, a boy who can control pigeons. Seiji comes up with an idea to integrate the homing instinct of pigeons into their current airplane module development and borrows Saburo's pigeon Kojiro. The Yapool notice this development...

programme.title: Ultraman Ace

programme.title: Ultraman Ace

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: On February 19th, 2000 Erik Morales fought Marco Antonio Barrera for WBC and WBO World Super Bantamweight titles at Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas which ended in a split decision victory for Morales.

programme.title: Vinny Pazienza vs Roberto Duran 2
programme.desc: On January 14th, 1995 Vinny Pazienza fought Roberto Duran for a second time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for Pazienza.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya 2
programme.desc: On September 13th, 2003 Shane Mosley and Oscar De La Hoya battled for a second time for the IBA, WBA and, WBC Super welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted 12 rounds continuing the reign of Mosley securing his win.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Juan Manuel Marquez vs Mike Alvarado
programme.desc: On May 17th, 2014, Juan Manuel Marquez fought Mike Alvarado in a WBO Welterweight Title eliminator at The Forum in Inglewood. Both fighters scored a knockdown in the bout, but it was Marquez that prevailed with a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Sergio Martinez vs Julio Cesar Chavez Jr
programme.desc: On September 15th, 2012, Sergio Martinez fought Julio Cesar Chavez Jr for the WBC Middleweight Title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. Despite an incredible effort from Chavez Jr in the final round, Martinez survived and won by decision.

programme.title: Leon Spinks vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On February 15th, 1978 Leon Spinks fought Muhammad Ali for WBA & WBC World Heavyweight titles although Spinks defeated Ali he was stripped of the WBC title as he chose to fight The Greatest, Muhammad Ali instead of the #1 contender Ken Norton.

programme.title: Kelly Pavlik vs Jermain Taylor 2
programme.desc: On February 16th, 2008 Kelly Pavlik faced Jermain Taylor for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas the 12 round bout resulted in a unanimous decision win for Pavlik.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 1
programme.desc: On December 13th, 1991 James Toney and Mike McCallum fought eachother for the first time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City for IBF World Middleweight title ending in a draw.
